gaps: Most tools are send-only and do not expose groups, glances, subscriptions, teams, licensing, or Open Client HTTP sync.
Emergency-priority receipt polling and cancellation are not usually modeled as a lifecycle.
Quota state is not treated as an operational preflight.
Existing tools do not create a local redacted ledger of sent notifications and receipt outcomes.
patterns: Environment or config based credentials are expected.
Stdin notification bodies are useful for shell agents.
Emergency sends need typed validation because retry and expire are required.
Pushover's API returns useful request ids and receipts that should be preserved.

novel_features.name: Agent send wrapper
novel_features.description: Send a notification from an argument or stdin with env/config defaults, named priorities, and emergency validation.
novel_features.rationale: Existing CLIs prove stdin send is table stakes, while agents need credentials and priority safety handled consistently.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Lets agents send test or operational notifications without leaking token values or remembering the raw endpoint shape.

novel_features.name: Emergency lifecycle
novel_features.description: Send or monitor an emergency notification receipt, polling acknowledgement status and supporting cancellation.
novel_features.rationale: Priority-2 sends are only useful if the caller can track acknowledgement and stop retries safely.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Turns emergency notifications from fire-and-forget sends into an auditable on-call workflow.

novel_features.name: Quota cockpit
novel_features.description: Show monthly send limit, remaining sends, and reset time from the app limits endpoint.
novel_features.rationale: Pushover rejects sends after quota exhaustion and exposes quota state both in headers and a dedicated endpoint.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Agents can check send budget before fanout or repeated test sends.

novel_features.name: Local notification ledger
novel_features.description: Search and export a local redacted ledger of notifications sent by this CLI and receipt outcomes.
novel_features.rationale: Pushover does not retain a server-side sent-message archive for this workflow; the CLI can record its own request ids and receipts.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Shows what this CLI sent, when, with which priority, without storing raw user keys or tokens.

novel_features.name: Inbox sync/search
novel_features.description: Download Open Client messages into local SQLite before optional server-side delete-through.
novel_features.rationale: Open Client workflows are destructive after download; local storage preserves the messages an agent needs to inspect.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Makes Pushover usable as both send channel and retrievable inbox for agents that own an Open Client device.

narrative.headline: Pushover from the terminal: send alerts, watch emergency receipts, inspect quota, and keep a redacted local notification ledger.
narrative.value_prop: pushover-pp-cli covers the full official API instead of stopping at send-message. It adds agent-safe env defaults, receipt lifecycle tools, quota preflight, and local history so alerts are auditable.
narrative.auth_narrative: Use a Pushover application token and user key. Set PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN and PUSHOVER_USER_KEY, or pass --app-token and --user-key explicitly. Legacy PUSHOVER_TOKEN/PUSHOVER_USER names are accepted for local compatibility.

quickstart.comment: Check send budget before test notifications
Review sends recorded by the CLI

troubleshoots.fix: Run users validate with the same user key and optional device before saving the destination
Provide retry >= 30 and expire <= 10800; use emergency watch for a safer flow
Run quota and wait until reset or reduce send volume

narrative.when_to_use: Use pushover-pp-cli for agent or ops workflows that need mobile push notifications, emergency receipt tracking, quota-aware sends, group delivery management, or Open Client message retrieval.

recipes.title: Send a low-priority test
recipes.explanation: Uses env/config credentials and records a local ledger row.

recipes.title: Check quota before a batch
recipes.explanation: Reads the dedicated app limits endpoint.

recipes.title: Validate a destination
recipes.explanation: Confirms the key is valid before relying on it in scripts.

recipes.title: Watch an emergency receipt
recipes.explanation: Polls the official receipt endpoint at a safe cadence.
